sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — EV Product Portfolio & Market Positioning
required_elements: EV production volumes and penetration as % of total sales
Vehicle portfolio by segment with ASP and pricing trends
EV market share by geography vs. competitors (Tesla, BYD, legacy OEMs)
Platform strategy (dedicated EV vs. legacy platform adaptation)

sections.title: Battery Cost & Gross Margin Trajectory
required_elements: Battery cost per kWh and progression toward profitability target
Battery supply strategy and cost advantage/disadvantage vs. peers
Gross margin profile by model and overall trajectory to scale
Regulatory credits as revenue and sustainability

sections.title: Autonomy Stack Maturity & Technology Differentiation
required_elements: SAE autonomy level and target capability with deployment timeline
Technology stack approach (vision-only vs. lidar) and maturity
Data advantage and AI competitive positioning
Regulatory approval path and insurance liability model

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/deliveries multiple benchmarking vs. mature and startup competitors
PEG ratio and growth trajectory sensitivity
DCF valuation with production ramp and terminal margin assumptions
Valuation collapse risk and path to profitability timeline

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Production and delivery guidance misses and demand signals
ASP erosion and price competition margin impact
Battery supply constraints and cost inflation risk
Autonomy technology delays and legacy OEM competitive threat

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Production ramp capacity and gross margin path to profitability
ASP sustainability and model mix impact on overall margins
Autonomy roadmap execution risk and competitive positioning
